configurations.name: 运行
configurations.command: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; & 'D:\anaconda3\python.exe' '.\visualize_graph.py'; $html=(Resolve-Path '.\data\graph.html').Path; $chrome=@('C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe','C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe',((Get-Command chrome.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source -First 1))) | Where-Object { $_ -and (Test-Path $_) } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $chrome) { throw 'Chrome not found' }; $p=Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList $html -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $ws=New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; [void]$ws.AppActivate($p.Id)
